note: golden_hash is empty until first `node golden-parity.test.mjs --update`.

protocols_detail.name: AP2
protocols_detail.artifact: Checkout Mandate + Payment Mandate, expressed as Verifiable Digital Credentials (VDCs)
protocols_detail.signed: Cryptographically signed VDCs; Open→Closed mandate chain
protocols_detail.scope: Cart + amount + payment instrument, bound at the Closed stage
protocols_detail.rail: Rail-agnostic — cards today; x402/stablecoin via the A2A x402 extension
protocols_detail.identity: FIDO / verifiable credentials; rides on A2A
protocols_detail.audit: Strong — non-repudiable chained VDC audit trail

protocols_detail.name: ACP
protocols_detail.artifact: Shared Payment Token (SPT) + Agentic Checkout session objects
protocols_detail.scope: Single-use SPT scoped to merchant + cart total
protocols_detail.rail: Card via any compatible PSP (Stripe first); merchant stays merchant of record

recommendation.rationale: A rail-agnostic, non-repudiable mandate chain across merchants is AP2's core design (Checkout + Payment Mandate VDCs). ACP fits if you are standardising on the OpenAI/Stripe checkout surface.

output_payload.note: Orientation snapshot only — verify every field against the cited primary source. Specs version monthly.

protocols_detail.name: AP2
protocols_detail.artifact: Checkout Mandate + Payment Mandate, expressed as Verifiable Digital Credentials (VDCs)
protocols_detail.signed: Cryptographically signed VDCs; Open→Closed mandate chain
protocols_detail.scope: Cart + amount + payment instrument, bound at the Closed stage
protocols_detail.rail: Rail-agnostic — cards today; x402/stablecoin via the A2A x402 extension
protocols_detail.identity: FIDO / verifiable credentials; rides on A2A
protocols_detail.audit: Strong — non-repudiable chained VDC audit trail

protocols_detail.name: ACP
protocols_detail.artifact: Shared Payment Token (SPT) + Agentic Checkout session objects
protocols_detail.scope: Single-use SPT scoped to merchant + cart total
protocols_detail.rail: Card via any compatible PSP (Stripe first); merchant stays merchant of record

protocols_detail.name: x402
protocols_detail.artifact: PaymentRequired + PaymentPayload objects in HTTP headers
protocols_detail.scope: Exact amount per scheme (exact); metered "upto" planned
protocols_detail.rail: Stablecoin on-chain (USDC) — Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Solana, World

protocols_detail.name: Visa TAP
protocols_detail.artifact: Scoped Visa tokenised credential + HTTP message signatures
protocols_detail.signed: HTTP Message Signatures (RFC 9421); 3 signatures incl. agent-recognition
protocols_detail.scope: Merchant scope via the issued tokenised credential
protocols_detail.identity: RFC 9421 / aligned with Web Bot Auth
protocols_detail.audit: Signature timestamps, session id, kid for replay protection

protocols_detail.name: MC Agent Pay
protocols_detail.artifact: Agentic Token (tokenised card credential via MDES)
protocols_detail.signed: Token bound to agent id + merchant scope + consent policy
protocols_detail.status: Announced Apr 2025; first live txn Sep 2025

protocols_detail.name: MPP
protocols_detail.artifact: Session object (charge / session / subscription) with a pre-authorized spend cap
protocols_detail.signed: Access-key-scoped, pre-authorized session; streamed micropayments within the cap
protocols_detail.scope: Spend cap + cadence/expiry, bound at session grant; per-draw within envelope
protocols_detail.rail: Multi-rail — stablecoins on Tempo (TIP-20), cards via Stripe, Bitcoin via Lightning
protocols_detail.identity: Access keys / scoped session keys ("OAuth of payments")
protocols_detail.audit: Session draw ledger; per-cycle reconciliation against the authorized envelope
protocols_detail.status: Tempo mainnet live Mar 2026; MPP open standard

recommendation.rationale: Recurring or streamed agent spend under a single pre-authorization is Tempo MPP's subscription/session model (spend cap + cadence, streamed micro-draws, per-cycle reconciliation). AP2 can supply the verifiable mandate envelope around it.

output_payload.note: Orientation snapshot only — verify every field against the cited primary source. Specs version monthly.
